sections.name: Entrees
items: Seoul Tacos - Korean salad mix, green onion, Seoul Sauce, crushed sesame seeds, lime; protein choice of bulgogi steak, chicken, spicy pork, or tofu
Street Tacos - white onion, cilantro, salsa verde; protein choice of bulgogi steak, chicken, spicy pork, or tofu
Burrito - flour tortilla, kimchi fried rice, shredded cheese, carrots, green onions, Korean salad mix, Seoul Sauce, wasabi sauce, sour cream; protein choice available
Quesadilla - jack and cheddar cheese, lettuce, Seoul Sauce, wasabi sauce, sour cream; protein choice available
Korean Cheesy Corn Quesadilla - melted mozzarella, roasted corn salad with Seoul Sauce, green onions, Tajin, spiced Cotija cheese on a flour tortilla
Gogi Bowl - white rice, Korean salad mix, carrots, green onions, sesame oil, gochujang sauce, sunny side up egg; protein choice available
Nachos - corn tortilla chips, Queso Blanco, green onion, roasted sesame seeds, kimchi, sour cream; protein choice available
Korean Fried Chicken - honey gochujang sauce, green onions, sesame seeds

sections.name: Sides, sweets, and drinks
items: Jack's Crispy Beef Taco - seasoned beef and beans, American cheese, lettuce, Tapatio
Side Seoul Taco or Street Taco
OG Kimchi
Kimchi Slaw - daikon radish, vinegar based
Kimchi Fried Rice - OG kimchi, green onion, sesame seeds
Chips and Queso - Queso Blanco, green onions, Korean pepper flakes
Chips and Salsa - Salsa Verde
Korean Cheesy Elote Bites - potato and corn croquettes with Seoul Sauce, Tajin, Cotija, green onion, lime
Wagyu Truffle Mandu - fried dumplings, chili crisp, white onion, cilantro, truffle soy, red pepper flakes
Miso Salted Caramel Cookie
Matcha Chocolate Chip Cookie
Churros

notes: Stored from a user paste so future rescans can use the pasted Seoul Taco menu text without refetching the website.
The pasted menu does not explicitly mention tree nuts or peanuts, but it does repeatedly call out sesame seeds and sesame oil.
Many items rely on named sauces like Seoul Sauce, wasabi sauce, gochujang sauce, and truffle soy without ingredient breakdowns in the pasted menu.
